Description: PDP loads with product name + price + ATC button visible
Steps: 1. Open a valid PDP URL
Expected Result: Product h1 title visible; price visible; Add to Cart/Bag button visible; no broken layout.

Description: Product can be added to cart — header cart count increments
Preconditions: In-stock configurable product; required options selectable
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Select colour 3. Select size 4. Click Add to Cart/Bag
Expected Result: Header cart count increments by 1 (or by qty selected).

Description: Correct variant (colour + size) appears in cart after ATC
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Select specific colour and size 3. Click Add to Cart/Bag 4. Open /cart
Expected Result: Cart row shows the exact colour and size that was selected.

Description: ATC is blocked and validation shown when required variant is not selected
Preconditions: Configurable product requiring colour and size
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Do NOT select required options 3. Click Add to Cart/Bag
Expected Result: Product is NOT added to cart; validation prompt or error message visible.

Description: Product name and price are visible and non-empty
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Inspect h1 and price
Expected Result: Product name (h1) is non-empty; price is visible and matches expected format (e.g. $99.99).

Description: Sale product shows original price and discounted price on PDP
Steps: 1. Open sale product PDP 2. Inspect price area
Expected Result: Both original (struck-through) and sale price visible.
Notes: @data-dependent — sale product may not be available at all times

Description: Colour swatches visible; selecting a colour updates product images and URL
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Observe colour swatches 3. Select a different colour
Expected Result: Colour swatch highlighted; main image updates; URL changes to reflect selected colour.
Notes: DRM colour swatches update URL slug per site-structure

Description: Size grid visible; OOS size is visually distinguished and unselectable
Preconditions: Product has at least one OOS size
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Inspect size grid
Expected Result: All sizes rendered; OOS size is visually different (strikethrough/disabled); cannot be selected.

Description: ATC success feedback is shown after adding product
Steps: 1. Select colour and size 2. Click Add to Cart/Bag
Expected Result: Mini-cart panel opens OR a success toast/notification appears; cart count updates.

Description: Main image and thumbnails visible; selecting a thumbnail updates the main image
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Observe main image and thumbnails 3. Click a different thumbnail
Expected Result: Main image updates to the selected thumbnail; previously selected thumbnail deselects.

Description: Accordion sections (Description/Details/Shipping) visible and can be expanded
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Locate accordion sections 3. Click each section to expand
Expected Result: Sections expand to reveal content; collapsed sections collapse cleanly.

Description: Afterpay payment messaging is visible on PDP for an in-stock product
Preconditions: Brand has Afterpay enabled; product is in-stock
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Inspect payment/financing messaging area
Expected Result: Payment messaging (Afterpay or similar) visible and non-empty.

Description: Header cart count increments correctly after ATC from PDP
Steps: 1. Note header cart count baseline 2. Add product to cart 3. Read header count
Expected Result: Count has increased by the quantity added.
Notes: Covered by PD-002 but isolated here for count-specific assertion

Description: Breadcrumb visible and category link navigates to the correct PLP
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Locate breadcrumb 3. Click the category link (second-to-last crumb)
Expected Result: URL changes to a category or PLP path; page loads correctly.

Description: Wishlist button is visible on PDP
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Locate wishlist button/icon
Expected Result: Wishlist entry point (heart icon or Add to Wishlist button) is visible.

Description: Sticky ATC bar appears when scrolling past the main ATC button
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Scroll past the main ATC button
Expected Result: Sticky ATC bar becomes visible and contains an ATC/ATB button.

Description: Qty selector present; changing qty before ATC adds the correct quantity to cart
Preconditions: PDP has qty selector; product in-stock with options selected
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Set qty to 2 3. Select colour + size 4. Click Add to Cart 5. Open mini-cart
Expected Result: Cart shows the product with qty 2.

Description: Recommendations module visible below the product details fold
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Scroll to bottom of product area
Expected Result: Recommendations section visible with at least one product card.

Description: PDP is functional on mobile viewport and ATC button is accessible
Steps: 1. Open PDP on mobile 2. Select colour and size 3. Tap Add to Cart/Bag
Expected Result: ATC button visible; product added to cart; header count increments.

Description: ATC from PDP fires a dataLayer add-to-cart event
Steps: 1. Intercept dataLayer.push 2. Add product to cart from PDP 3. Read captured events
Expected Result: At least one event matching /add_to_cart|addToCart/i captured.
Notes: Partial — event fires verified; payload schema not validated

Description: Dr. Martens ATC button label is 'Add to Bag' not 'Add to Cart'
Preconditions: Dr. Martens project; in-stock product PDP loaded
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Inspect primary ATC button label
Expected Result: Button text matches /add to bag/i. Does NOT match /add to cart/i.
Notes: DRM brand selectors override ATC label — validate against selectors

Description: Dr. Martens Find in Store entry point visible and modal opens
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Locate Find in Store link/button 3. Click it
Expected Result: Find in Store entry point visible; clicking opens a modal or page with store search input.

Description: Vans PDP shows Bazaarvoice reviews — ratings and review count visible
Preconditions: Vans project; PDP loaded for a product with reviews
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Scroll to reviews section 3. Inspect review stars and count
Expected Result: Rating star widget and review count (≥ 0) visible and non-empty.
Notes: Bazaarvoice is Vans-only per site-structure.md; skip if product has no reviews

Description: Vans PDP shows TrueFit size recommendation entry point
Preconditions: Vans project; PDP loaded for a footwear product
Steps: 1. Open PDP 2. Locate TrueFit widget or 'What's my size?' CTA
Expected Result: TrueFit widget or CTA visible near size selector.
Notes: TrueFit enabled via truefitcorp.com script on Vans; may not appear on all product types
